name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)

# 1. LOAD DATA
# Pre-transformed & simplified river
vjosa_vec <- readRDS("vjosa_vec2.rds")


# Species Presence/Absence matrix
dataset <- read.csv("coleos_vjosa_pa.csv")
names(dataset)[1] <- "All sites"

# Sites with 'lng' and 'lat' columns in 4326
    sites <- read.csv("sites.csv")

# 2. PRE-CALCULATIONS (Run once outside the server for speed)
# Check if catchment_area exists to define line widths
if("catchment_area_km2" %in% colnames(vjosa_vec)) {
    lwd_values <- as.numeric(scale(vjosa_vec$catchment_area_km2, center=FALSE) *3)+0.3
} else {
    lwd_values <- 2 # Fallback if column is missing
}

# 3. USER INTERFACE
ui <- fluidPage(
    titlePanel("Vjosa's Coleoptera Distribution Map"),
    sidebarLayout(
        sidebarPanel(
            selectInput("dataset", 
                        label = "Select species", 
                        choices = colnames(dataset)),
            hr(),
            helpText("Map showing the distribution of coleoptera species across the Vjosa River network.")
        ),
        mainPanel(
            leafletOutput("vjosaMap", height = "600px")
        )
    )
)

# 4. SERVER LOGIC
server <- function(input, output, session) {
    
    # Render the base map once
    output$vjosaMap <- renderLeaflet({
        leaflet() %>%
            addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
            # Set the initial view to Albania
            setView(lng = 19.9, lat = 40.3, zoom = 9) %>% 
            addPolylines(data = vjosa_vec, 
                         color = "#005AB5", 
                         weight = lwd_values, 
                         opacity = 1,
                         group = "river")
    })
    
    # Reactive observer for species points
    observe({
        req(input$dataset)
        
        # Match species presence to sites
        # Logic assumes row 1 of 'dataset' = row 1 of 'sites'
        sel_point_present <- sites[dataset[[input$dataset]] > 0, ]
        
        proxy <- leafletProxy("vjosaMap")
        
        if(nrow(sel_point_present) > 0) {
            proxy %>%
                clearMarkers() %>%
                addCircleMarkers(
                    data = sel_point_present,
                    lng = ~lng, lat = ~lat,
                    radius = 6,
                    color = "white",
                    fillColor = "red",
                    fillOpacity = 0.7,
                    weight = 1
                )
        } else {
            proxy %>% clearMarkers()
        }
    })
}

# 5. RUN APP
shinyApp(ui, server)
